# Attribution — demo_hla_tcr_bulk.crb

The real donor HLA genotypes and public TCR-beta chains bundled in
`demo_hla_tcr_bulk.crb` are derived from the Emerson et al. cohort, cleaned and
published by DeWitt et al.:

- Emerson et al., *Nature Genetics* 2017 (cohort and HLA typing).
- DeWitt et al., *eLife* 2018 (cleaned and published derivative).

Distributed as `pubtcrs_data_v1.tgz`, Zenodo record **1248193**
(<https://zenodo.org/records/1248193>), under the **Creative Commons Attribution
4.0 International (CC-BY 4.0)** license (<https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/>).

Tools: <https://github.com/phbradley/pubtcrs>

This file accompanies the installed demo so the CC-BY 4.0 attribution travels
with the data (the full provenance and build steps live in `data-raw/DATASETS.md`
in the source repository, which is not part of the installed package).
